options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information.

options.name: --directory
options.description:
The root directory to serve. [Current
directory]

options.name: --open-browser
options.description:
Open a web browser when the server
starts. [Default = false]
You can also provide the subpath to
launch by using -o:<PATH>.
Example: -o:/path/index.html

options.name: --port
options.description:
Port to use [8080]. Use 0 for a dynamic
port.

options.name: --address
options.description:
Address to use. [Default = localhost].
Accepts IP addresses,
'localhost' to accept only loopback
requests, or
'any' to accept requests from any IP
address.

options.name: --path-base
options.description:
The base URL path appended to the site
URL.

options.name: --reverse-proxy
options.description:
Map a path pattern to another url.
Expected format is
<SOURCE_PATH_PATTERN>=<DESTINATION_URL_PREFIX>.
SOURCE_PATH_PATTERN uses ASP.NET routing
syntax. Use {**all} to match anything.

options.name: --default-extensions
options.description:
A comma-delimited list of extensions to
use when no extension is provided in the
URL. [.html,.htm]

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Show less console output.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show more console output.

options.name: --headers
options.description:
A header to return with all
file/directory responses. e.g. -h
"X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block"

options.name: --tls
options.description: Enable TLS (HTTPS)

options.name: --cert
options.description:
A PEM encoded certificate file to use for
HTTPS connections.
Defaults to file in current directory
named 'cert.pem'

options.name: --key
options.description:
A PEM encoded private key to use for
HTTPS connections.
Defaults to file in current directory
named 'private.key'

options.name: --pfx
options.description:
A PKCS#12 certificate file to use for
HTTPS connections.
Defaults to file in current directory
named 'cert.pfx'

options.name: --pfx-pwd
options.description:
The password to open the certificate
file. (Optional)

options.name: --mime
options.description:
Add a mapping from file extension to MIME
type. Empty MIME removes a mapping.
Expected format is <EXT>=<MIME>.

options.name: --gzip
options.description: Enable gzip compression

options.name: --brotli
options.description: Enable brotli compression

options.name: --compression-level
options.description:
The level of compression to use, when
compression is enabled
Allowed values are: Optimal, Fastest,
NoCompression, SmallestSize.

options.name: --cors
options.description:
Enable CORS (it will enable CORS for all
origins and all methods)

options.name: --save-options
options.description:
Save specified options to .netconfig for
subsequent runs.

options.name: --config-file
options.description: Use the given .netconfig file.

options.name: --fallback-file
options.description:
The path to a file which is served for
requests that do not match known file
names.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.
